---
title: "Projects"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

::::::: page-wrap
This page highlights academic and professional projects related to
marketing, analytics, dashboards, presentations, and data-driven
decision-making.

:::::: project-grid
::: project-card
## Introduction to Data Science in R (Reflection Essay)

**Focus:** Data science concepts and technical reflection\
**Tools:** R, RStudio, Quarto

In this project, I wrote a reflection essay on my experience learning
the basics of data science using R, Quarto, and RStudio. The assignment
helped me understand how these tools work together to analyze data and
present information in a clear and organized way. I also learned how
Quarto can combine code, text, and output into one professional
document, which is useful for communicating insights.

**Skills shown:** R basics, Quarto document creation, data analysis
concepts, technical writing [Open full reflection
essay](data-science-reflection/.html){.btn}
:::

::: project-card
## Research Participation Effectiveness Proposal

**Focus:** Survey research and data analysis\
**Tools:** Quarto, survey questionnaire, research design

This project focused on developing research questions and identifying
independent and dependent variables based on an existing survey about
students' research participation experience. In addition, I worked with
my group to organize and analyze the data given to us. This project
helped me better understand how survey responses can be used to draw
meaningful insights.

**Skills shown:** Research design, survey interpretation, data
wrangling, data visualization, Quarto presentation [Open full group
project](projects/Group-1-Proposal.html){.btn}
:::

::: project-card
## Data Analysis in R (Application Project)

**Focus:** Data analysis and visualization using R\
**Tools:** R, RStudio, tidyverse, Quarto

In this assignment, I applied data science concepts using R to solve a
series of problems involving data manipulation, conditional logic, and
visualization. I worked with real datasets to clean, organize, and
analyze data, and created visualizations to communicate insights. The
project also involved building reusable functions and using tools like
the tidyverse to streamline analysis.

**Skills shown:** R programming, data wrangling, data visualization,
functional programming, Quarto presentation, problem-solving [Open full
R application project](projects/r-application-project.html){.btn}
:::
::::::
:::::::
